rationale: The proposed homestead exemption increase under Tax Code §11.13(b) has no operative relationship to Educ. Code §29.053, which governs bilingual education program establishment and enrollment thresholds.
quote: Sec. 29.053. ESTABLISHMENT OF BILINGUAL EDUCATION AND SPECIAL LANGUAGE PROGRAMS.
_note: No conflict; rule_text concerns bilingual education mandates unrelated to property tax homestead exemptions.
